Package io.goobi.viewer.model.security.authentication.model

package io.goobi.viewer.model.security.authentication.model
Contains request and response data-transfer objects exchanged with external authentication backends such as Bibliotheca, Littera, VuFind, and XService.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.model.security.authentication
    Provides authentication provider implementations for the Goobi viewer, supporting local credentials as well as external systems such as OpenID Connect, VuFind, Bibliotheca, Littera, and HTTP-header-based single sign-on.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BibliothecaAuthenticationRequest
    Request DTO for sending user credentials to the Bibliotheca authentication service.
    BibliothecaAuthenticationResponse
    Authentication response object for Bibliotheca.
    BooleanDeserializer
    Jackson deserialiser that converts various truthy string representations to a Boolean value.
    BooleanSerializer
    Jackson serialiser that converts a Boolean value to the string representation expected by the Bibliotheca API.
    LitteraAuthenticationResponse
    Representation of the Littera authentication response which is delivered as xml.
    UserPasswordAuthenticationRequest
    Request DTO carrying a username and password for local authentication.
    VuAuthenticationResponse
    Response DTO for the VuFind authentication service, carrying user data on successful login.
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Blocks
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Date
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Expired
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Group
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Reason
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.Request
     
    VuAuthenticationResponse.User
     
    XServiceAuthenticationResponse
    Authentication response object for X-Service.
